eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Potter, TX; at 02:40 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 01:40 PM MAY 18, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: Voluntary Evacuation from Two Deer Trail, Bishop Estates, Quail Canyon due to wildfire. This order is effective until further notice. Leave now and follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Visit SOCIAL MEDIA for updates. Stay informed via local news or official channels.
